pi_items.source: Direct inspection of task.json structure via jq query

pi_items.verified_value: PHPFina is engine 5 in Emoncms - valid feed engine
Intervals in Emoncms PHPFina are specified in seconds (integer values, minimum 5 seconds)
pi_items.source: https://github.com/emoncms/emoncms/blob/master/docs/timeseries/Fixed-interval.md and seed data script confirms interval parameter in seconds

pi_items.verified_value: http://localhost:80 - Docker Compose maps port 80 to container port 80 for openenergymonitor/emoncms:latest
pi_items.source: docker-compose.yml line 55: ports: [80:80], env.json confirms HTTP access

pi_items.metadata_value: username: admin, password: admin (from task description)
pi_items.verified_value: Admin user created with username='admin' and password='admin' via setup_emoncms.sh line 148
pi_items.source: setup_emoncms.sh lines 145-173, specifically Python script that creates admin user in MySQL

pi_items.metadata_value: Name='Boiler Power', Tag='heat', Unit='W', Engine=PHPFina, Interval=10 (from task description)
pi_items.verified_value: All parameters are valid Emoncms feed creation fields (name, tag, unit, engine, options with interval)
pi_items.source: https://emoncms.org/site/api and seed data generation script (setup_emoncms.sh lines 240-244) demonstrates API call: feed/create.json?apikey=X&name=Y&tag=Z&engine=5&options=json&unit=W

pi_items.metadata_value: Not specified in metadata (no metadata field exists)
pi_items.verified_value: Seed data is SYNTHETIC - generated by Python script in setup_emoncms.sh (lines 202-421), NOT downloaded from external source
pi_items.source: setup_emoncms.sh embeds seed data generation with realistic but fictional energy monitoring values (e.g., 'House Power', 'Solar PV', generated power curves)

pi_items.verified_value: Seed data creates 6 feeds: House Power, Appliances, Solar PV, House Temperature, Heat Pump Power, Test Feed (engine 5 = PHPFina)
pi_items.source: setup_emoncms.sh lines 281-286: create_feed() calls for House Power (tag=power, unit=W, interval=10), Appliances (tag=power, unit=W, interval=10), Solar PV (tag=solar, unit=W, interval=10), House Temperature (tag=temperature, unit=degC, interval=60), Heat Pump Power (tag=heat, unit=W, interval=10), Test Feed (tag=test, unit=W, interval=10)

pi_items.verified_value: Boiler Power feed is NOT pre-created in seed data - the task agent must create it from scratch
pi_items.source: setup_emoncms.sh seed data script (lines 278-286) does not include Boiler Power feed. setup_task.sh lines 12-18 explicitly remove any existing Boiler Power feed before task starts: 'db_query SELECT id FROM feeds WHERE name="Boiler Power" AND userid=1'

privileged_info_summary: The create_feed task is a web UI interaction task targeting Emoncms (openenergymonitor/emoncms:latest running on http://localhost). No metadata field exists in task.json to audit. The task instructions require creating a PHPFina feed (engine 5) with parameters: Name='Boiler Power', Tag='heat', Unit='W', Interval=10 seconds. The Emoncms admin credentials are username='admin', password='admin', created during environment setup. The environment includes synthetic seed data with 5 existing feeds (House Power, Appliances, Solar PV, House Temperature, Heat Pump Power) using PHPFina engine with 10-second intervals, plus a database (MariaDB 10.11) and Redis cache. All PHPFina feed parameters (name, tag, unit, engine, interval in seconds) verified against Emoncms API documentation.
